requestContext.taskSummary: Compile one validator skill and one target skill into a closed target-specialized validator prompt.

files.content:
---
name: skill-example-validator
description: Validate one target skill output.
---

# Purpose

Use this skill to validate one target skill output.

# Reference Map

- Validator compiler contract: `contracts/validator-compiler.contract.json`
- Output schema: `schemas/report.schema.json`

---
name: skill-example-target
description: Produce one target output.
---

# Purpose

Use this skill to produce one target output.

# Reference Map

- Target validator contract: `contracts/target-validator.contract.json`
- Output schema: `schemas/output.schema.json`
- Boundary rules: `references/20-boundary.md`

# Boundary

Stay within the target field boundary.
